chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-124 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing. 20.10.2017. Mr. Roshan Ali Azeem Mallah, Advocate for applicant. Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G. for the State alongwith ASI Ghulam Mustafa of P.S Shahdadpur. Applicant is mother of alleged detainee aged about 6 years, who is residing with her paternal grandmother after death of her father, the husband of the applicant. She has been produced by ASI Ghulam Mustafa of P.S Shahdadpur, and is accompanied by paternal grandmother respondent No.4. She is handed over to her mother, the applicant. Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
